name: Augmenting AI Scoring of Essays with GPT-Generated Responses
summary: Peer-reviewed writing-assessment study evaluating GPT-4 and GPT-4o essay generation as training augmentation for AI essay scoring. The study uses PERSUADE 2.0 essays from seven prompts, compares GPT-generated and student essays, evaluates augmented scoring models on held-out student essays, and analyzes subgroup scoring discrepancies.

access_attempts.notes: Article landing page verified authors, DOI, keywords, abstract, and publication date.
PDF downloaded and text extracted locally. Relevant extraction spans Methods, Results, and Discussion sections.
